markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the content partnership between Redis and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Urgent Need:** Organic traffic—Redis's most critical channel—is declining in both volume and quality. The goal is to reverse this trend by scaling content production from \~4 posts/quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [**Strategic Challenge:** Redis is known only as a "cache." The core mission is to reframe its value as a mission-critical, enterprise-grade data platform, especially for AI.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** The "illusion of free" is the main hurdle. Redis Enterprise's value lies in its reliability (e.g., Active-Active redundancy), security, and expert support, which open-source lacks.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [**Success Metrics:** The partnership will be measured by increased traffic sessions, higher-quality conversions (Book a Meeting, Cloud Signups), and improved AI visibility (citations).](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3274.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Declining Organic Traffic & Limited Brand Perception

  - [Organic traffic, the primary discovery channel for Redis's developer-led motion, is declining month-over-month.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [The decline is in human traffic, not junk, as conversion rates remain steady.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [LLM traffic (e.g., ChatGPT) is high-quality but low-volume, preventing the "art of the possible" conversations needed to reframe Redis's value.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**Core Perception Gap:** Redis is seen as a simple cache, not a full-featured data platform.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [**Goal:** Shift perception from "the how" (caching) to "the why" (fast app performance, seamless integration, expert support).](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

### The Solution: Strategic Content to Drive Enterprise Adoption

  - [**Target Audience:**](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [**Doers:** Developers, architects, operators (primary influencers).](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [**Leaders:** CTOs, VPs (decision-makers).](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [**New Focus:** ML engineers, agent developers.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**Ideal Customer Profile (ICP):**](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Driver:** High-volume, high-speed data needs.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Firmographics:** Large enterprise ($1B+ revenue) or hyper-growth startups (e.g., Character.ai, OpenAI).](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Psychographics:** Low risk tolerance; willing to outsource expertise for mission-critical apps.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape:**](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
      - [**Primary Competitor:** Redis Open Source.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
          - [**Strategy:** Consultative approach to guide users from open source to enterprise as their needs scale.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
          - [**Enterprise Value:** Reliability (Active-Active redundancy), security, expert support.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
      - [**Other Competitors:** ElastiCache/Valkey, hyperscalers (AWS, Google).](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
          - [**Challenge:** Many users don't realize they're using open-source Redis via a managed service, not Redis Enterprise.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=2215.0)

### Current State: Reactive Process & Performance Insights

  - [**Content Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=2870.0)
      - [**Flow:** Briefs → PMMs (SMEs) → Product review → Brand review (often skipped for blogs due to bandwidth).](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=2870.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Reactive (tied to product releases), not proactive (strategic).](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3165.0)
      - [**Bottlenecks:** Limited bandwidth from PMM and Brand teams.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
  - [**Top-Performing Content (by traffic):**](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=2498.0)
    1.  [Security advisory blog](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
    2.  ["What is Valkey" blog](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
    3.  ["AI agents, short-term, long-term memory with Redis" blog](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
    4.  ["Semantic hashing" blog](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** "Show, don't tell" content (e.g., reference architectures, use case demos) performs best with the developer audience.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=2759.0)

### Success Metrics & Goals

  - [**Primary Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3274.0)
      - [Traffic Sessions](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3274.0)
      - [Conversions (Book a Meeting, Cloud Signups)](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3396.0)
  - [**Secondary Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3446.0)
      - [AI Visibility Score (via Profound)](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3446.0)
      - [Citations in LLMs (ChatGPT, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3446.0)
  - [**Quality Guardrail:** Maintain or improve conversion rates to ensure new traffic is high-quality and monetizable.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3318.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fung-Lin:** Finalize and share the onboarding document with GrowthX, including sales call transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3548.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Review the onboarding document and identify any missing resources or required interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3548.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Schedule a brand onboarding session with Allison to review the AI playbook and voice guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=3617.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Begin the 8-week strategy sprint, starting with research and a calibration article to align on quality before scaling production.](https://fathom.video/share/uhYt8P3omrY4fwPCbSBWE2iAWEt84Vaw?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
